name: Mal
description:
A Crawford Christmas...

─── ⋆⋅ ᛪ ⋅⋆ ───

anypov | established relationship

SCENARIO
♡ Location: The Crawford Farm
♡ Time: Late Morning (s1) / Evening (s2)
♡ Context: It's Christmas! Mal first met you a month ago when your car broke down in front of their property. Now you're his Grub.

Scenario 1: Mal is very excited to watch you open the gift he made for you.

Scenario 2: It's time for dinner, but you got sick after he let you go out in the snow! He's overly concerned.

CW/TW: DD:DNE Potential for non-con/dub-con/cnc, cannibalism, kidnapping, sexism, traditional family views, possible violence/gore/murder/death, smegma, has a foot fetish, physical/verbal abuse in his past, undiagnosed bipolar disorder

Tested using kolach3's prompt for JLLM and cheese's prompt for Deepseek! I personally use Claude and/or Deepseek when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

𝚃𝚑𝚎 𝙲𝚛𝚊𝚠𝚏𝚘𝚛𝚍𝚜

Original: First Meeting
NPCs: Chev, Stew, Fallow

c: my xmas gift to myself and to you all!
